input.note: Contract: `zxs verify` exits 0 when the project passes and non-zero when any stage fails (dna/product/cli.md CLI-PROD-OUT-VERIFY-002; dna/product/toolkit-runtime.md RT-PROD-VERIFY-002). Executed by the cli fixture runner (authored in R-W4-05) against the REGENERATED @zx-vibes/toolkit, normalized via the cli-snapshot profile. Asserts the exit-code contract only — NOT byte-for-byte legacy output (ADR-0013, ADR-0015). Flips to covered when the regenerated toolkit passes it.

cases.name: pass
cases.project: a minimal project that assembles, runs without a hang, and has no failing tests

cases.name: fail-build
cases.project: a project whose entry has an assembly error
